Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional.supplier

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional.supplier
Functional suppliers for FlixelGDX.

This package contains functional interfaces for suppliers of primitive values to provide a more idiomatic Java API and to avoid boxing primitive values.

  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    ByteSupplier
    Represents a supplier of byte-valued results.
    CharSupplier
    Represents a supplier of char-valued results.
    FloatSupplier
    Represents a supplier of float-valued results.
    ShortSupplier
    Represents a supplier of short-valued results.
